Container.Name: WiiM-Dashboard
Container.Overview: A self-hosted, dark-themed web dashboard to monitor and control your WiiM / LinkPlay audio devices — now playing, EQ, sub-out, source/output switching, presets and more. It runs on your server and talks to the device over your LAN (it never modifies the device). After it starts: open the WebUI, create your admin login, then add your WiiM by its IP address. The CA Auto Update Applications plugin keeps it current.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the dashboard web UI.

Config.Name: AUTH_SECRET
Config.Description: REQUIRED. A long random secret (32+ chars) that signs login sessions. Generate one, e.g. on a terminal: openssl rand -base64 48

Config.Name: COOKIE_SECURE
Config.Description: Keep false for plain-http access on your LAN (the Unraid default). Set true only when serving over HTTPS through a reverse proxy.

Config.Name: APP_ORIGIN
Config.Description: Optional. Public https origin (e.g. https://wiim.example.com) when behind a reverse proxy — enables strict CSRF origin checks.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Stores the SQLite database and runtime data. The container fixes ownership automatically on start, so a normal appdata path works.
